channel.title: Posts on Maciej Klim
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Maciej Klim

item.title: Windows Prefetch Forensics
item.description: Understanding binary execution artifacts and how to analyze them using PECmd.exe.

item.title: Windows USB Forensics
item.description: Learn how to identify historical USB activity, including tracing connected devices and artifacts left behind.

item.title: Windows SRUM Forensics
item.description: Analyzing SRUM database to reconstruct per-process network usage and system activity.

item.title: Windows WiFi Forensics
item.description: Use netsh to analyze saved WiFi profiles and reconstruct wifi connection history.

item.title: Phishing Trends Observed in 2025
item.description: From fake M365 login pages to QR-code scams. Discover the top phishing trends seen this year.

item.title: CVE 2013-3900: WinVerifyTrust Signature Validation
item.description: When signature validation is lax, detection breaks. See what defenders must do to close that gap.

item.title: CVE 2024-30080: Microsoft Message Queueing Remote Code Execution
item.description: Unused Windows features can quietly become RCE’s. See how MSMQ services can put defenders at risk.

item.title: CVE-2023-3438: Unquoted Service Path
item.description: Windows doesn’t forgive sloppy service paths. Learn how a single missing quote lets attackers hijack execution flow and escalate to SYSTEM.
